column4: вЗФ a 1 вАЛ s j вАЛ ( y 1 ) + a 2 вАЛ s j вАЛ ( y 2 ) + вА¶ + a n вАЛ s j вАЛ ( y n ) вЛИ b \displaystyle\iff a_{1}s_{j}(y_{1})+a_{2}s_{j}(y_{2})+\ldots+a_{n}s_{j}(y_{n})\bowtie b

column3: ( ѕГ , j ) вКІ ѕХ 1 вИІ ѕХ 2 \displaystyle(\sigma,j)\models\phi_{1}\land\phi_{2}
